pre_commit.description: Strict inventory, drift, full tests, browser smoke (Playwright), API+Madeira smoke, release gate

steps.description: Strict full AKOS inventory (OVERALL: PASS)
Repo vs runtime drift (agent/A2A inventory, tools policy)
Full pytest suite via scripts/test.py all
Browser smoke; Scenario 0 registry (Playwright per DEVELOPER_CHECKLIST)
FastAPI control plane + Madeira interaction
Unified release gate (HLK, process_list header, vault links, ...)
Initiative 48: operator UAT dossier snapshot (markdown only; writes artifacts/uat-dossier/)
Initiative 49 P12: offline brand-voice fast-lint of external prose defaults (deck story + slides; frontmatter and inline backtick paths skipped per BRAND_JARGON_AUDIT §4 scope).

Initiative 79 P2: anti-jargon drift gate over People canonicals (D-IH-79-N). Forbids Tech-Lab framework names, infra jargon, and codenames in People-owned canonicals; Tech Lab canonicals are out of scope and may carry framework names freely.

Initiative 86 P1 (D-IH-86-H): INITIATIVE_REGISTRY notes 'Program anchors:' prefix FK-resolves to PROGRAM_REGISTRY.csv. Stage A advisory (validator no-ops rows without the prefix; Stage B promotes anchors to a first-class column at I86 P2 / D-IH-86-J).

Initiative 89 P0 (D-IH-89-E, 2026-05-17): BBR dual-register drift gate flipped from INFO to FAIL. Scans external surfaces (boilerplate/, _assets/advops/**/deck/, **/dossier_*.md, **/founder-filed/, **/adviser-handoff/, hlk-erp public surfaces) for internal-register tokens (PRJ-HOL-*, counterparty, elicitation, etc.) per BRAND_BASELINE_REALITY_MATRIX.md §3. Required from day one; CI-block expected on 7 pre-existing PRJ-HOL-FOUNDING-2026 leaks in ENISA founder-filed dossiers until ADVOPS triage closes OPS-86-5. Hot-fix lane: AKOS_BRAND_BASELINE_REALITY_SOFT=1 env var temporarily downgrades to advisory.

I86 Wave E (D-IH-86-P, 2026-05-19) + Wave F closure (D-IH-86-Q, 2026-05-19): External-render discipline drift gate. Scans external-tagged surfaces under _assets/advops/**, _assets/touchpoint-kit/**, Think Big/Advisers/**, Marketing/Brand/** for paired render artifacts (PDF/Web/ERP/Mail/Slide/Broadcast). Audience-class to render-format matrix per akos-external-render-discipline.mdc RULE 2. Promoted INFO -> FAIL on 2026-05-19 (D-IH-86-Q) once render-pending-tracker.md reached zero entries; now runs with --strict (require trail for every external surface) + --strict-freshness (source_sha256 must match current sha). Template surfaces (artifact_kind: deck_template) and J-OP-only surfaces are exempt. Demotion procedure (soft/hard) per SOP-EXTERNAL_RENDER_GATE_PROMOTION_001 section 6.

I86 Wave F (D-IH-86-P sibling + operator B1 ratify, 2026-05-19) + Wave G Bundle B-G1 closure (D-IH-86-R, 2026-05-19): Locale-orthography drift gate. EN promoted to --strict-en after Wave G B-G1 shipped render-step auto-curl + post-curl validator semantics: the EN smart-quote scan now applies apply_smart_quotes(body, 'en') before counting straight quotes, so the gate reads delivery-surface typography (post-curl) rather than source-keystroke convenience. ES + FR remain advisory pending operator ratification of strict promotion. Word-list catalogue per locale lives in akos/orthography.py (ES diacritic/tilde; FR diacritic/cedilla; EN post-curl threshold). Per-locale promotion: --strict-es / --strict-fr stay opt-in. AKOS_LOCALE_ORTHOGRAPHY_STRICT=1 env enables all-strict. Language-untagged surfaces are no-op (skip).

I86 Wave H Lane E (D-IH-86-AB proposed; canonical row appended by parent after Lane A + Lane C land, 2026-05-19): canonical-enrichment-freshness drift gate. Operator-ratified 3-tier staleness (3 days short / 30 days medium / 90 days long-term) per operator quote 'Option D but make it 3 days, because we're real fast today'. Scans `docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Admin/O5-1/**/canonicals/**/*.md` for `last_review_at:` (preferred) or `last_review:` (fallback) frontmatter, categorises every surface into fresh / medium / long-term / stale, and emits a per-area summary table to stdout. Paired Pydantic chassis at akos/canonical_freshness.py (FreshnessThresholds + CanonicalFreshnessRow + FreshnessAreaSummary). Paired SOP `SOP-TECH_CANONICAL_FRESHNESS_AUDIT_001` mint pending. Runs INFO-only at mint per the L86 Lane E acceptance contract; promoting to FAIL is a successor wave decision once long-term + stale rows have been triaged via per-wave-boundary checklist.

I78 P2 (D-IH-78-CLOSURE Wave H lane-1, 2026-05-19) — INFO advisory self-test for the brand-voice LLM-as-judge chassis. Exercises akos/brand_voice_judge.py Pydantic models + scripts/judge_brand_voice.py mock provider round-trip (2/2 verdicts: PASS exemplar + FAIL paraphrase exemplar) + cache-key determinism. The judge runs one layer above the deterministic Pack A1 regex floor (validate_brand_voice_register.py) as advisory semantics. Production prose-scanning rollout is gated on Strand C bias-audit cadence + Strand D D-IH-78-PROMOTE ratify, both forward-chartered to a strict-mode-promotion follow-up initiative per I78 cluster-burndown axis-2 pragmatic-closure executive call.

Initiative 86 Wave M (D-IH-86-BO, 2026-05-21) extended at Wave P (D-IH-86-CL): inter-wave regression discipline self-test. Validates akos/hlk_inter_wave_regression.py Pydantic SSOT (RegressionFindingRow + RegressionSweepReport frozen models) + scripts/inter_wave_regression_sweep.py PROBE_REGISTRY shape (13 probes: 12 base DIM-01..DIM-12 + DIM-13-ROLE-PROCESS-PAIRING-COMPLETENESS from Wave P paired-mint completeness doctrine per D-IH-86-CL). Does NOT run the actual 13-dimension sweep (that's on_demand cadence per the INTER_WAVE_REGRESSION_DISCIPLINE.md canonical §4 + process_list.csv hol_peopl_dtp_inter_wave_regression_001 cadence column). Self-test mode keeps CI cost at ~2s per R-86-WaveM-7 mitigation. Paired runbook + canonical + SOP + cursor rule shipped Wave M P1-P2; DIM-13 added Wave P P1.

I88 (D-IH-88-F, 2026-06-05): intent-ranked regression discipline self-test. Validates akos/hlk_intent_ranked_regression.py Pydantic SSOT (IntentTier + RegressionSurface frozen models; 7 intent tiers + 12 regression surfaces) + scripts/intent_ranked_regression.py ranking (ICS = 3*intent + 2*time + 2*risk + 1*detection_gap; severity-first surfaces lead; deterministic re-rank). Does NOT run the actual probes (those are on_demand per the INTENT_RANKED_REGRESSION_DISCIPLINE.md canonical S6 cadence + process_list.csv hol_peopl_dtp_intent_ranked_regression_001 cadence column). Self-test mode keeps CI cost at ~1s. Value layer above the inter-wave regression self-test; paired runbook + canonical + SOP + cursor rule + skill + Pydantic shipped at I88 mint.

Initiative 81 P2 Bundle B-2a (D-IH-81-V, 2026-05-23): FINOPS ledger Pydantic chassis + 4-strategy counterparty resolution ladder + ECB 4-tier FX fallback + 0.5% Stripe-vs-ECB divergence detector + OPS_REGISTER auto-emit round-trip against synthetic Stripe-event fact stream. Exercises akos.hlk_finops_ledger (RegisteredFactRow Pydantic + 14-col tuple + 4 enum frozensets + resolve_counterparty_id + compute_fx_snapshot) + akos.hlk_fx_rate (ECB XML parser + EUR-base inversion + fallback ladder + divergence detector) + akos.hlk_ops_register_emit (24-col contract + RICE auto-score). FK-resolves synthetic counterparty_ids to FINOPS_COUNTERPARTY_REGISTER finops_* slugs. Default mode runs at INFO advisory (never blocks gate); --strict mode (not invoked in pre_commit) FAILS on synthetic errors. Promotes INFO->FAIL when Bundle B-2c lands + first live Stripe charge_succeeded round-trip succeeds in production per D-IH-81-W closure (proof-of-life criterion: resolved counterparty_id + computed amount_minor_eur via ECB cache hit). Substrate-only mint here; executable Edge Functions + worker land in Bundle B-2b; canonical CSV writes + governance close in Bundle B-2c.

Initiative 81 P2 Bundle B-2b (D-IH-81-W, 2026-05-23): FINOPS DLQ drain runbook Pydantic chassis self-test. Validates scripts/finops_dlq_drain.py PGMQ_RPC_NAMES wiring (5 RPCs: send_queue/read_queue/delete_queue/archive_queue/read_dlq exposed via supabase/migrations/20260524100000_i81_p2_b2b_pgmq_rpc_wrappers.sql SECURITY DEFINER wrappers) + DlqEntry/DrainOperation/DrainSummary frozen Pydantic models + CLI surface (--self-test / --inspect / --requeue / --acknowledge --reason). Default mode runs at INFO advisory (never blocks gate); operator invokes runbook on demand when finops-writer-worker DLQ depth alerts surface in OPERATOR_INBOX.md per R3-a 3-layer retry architecture + R4-a HLK-ERP convergence. Self-test mode keeps CI cost at ~1s. Paired runbook + Pydantic SSOT + pytest (test_finops_dlq_drain.py 28 PASS) + cursor-rule alignment (akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc Rule 1 AC-HUMAN + AC-AUTOMATION) shipped at this commit.

Initiative 81 P2 Bundle B-2b (D-IH-81-W, 2026-05-23): Stripe metadata audit runbook Pydantic chassis self-test. Validates scripts/stripe_audit_metadata.py StripeMetadataFinding/StripeAuditReport frozen Pydantic models + classify_customer/classify_subscription predicate functions (orphan-customer / orphan-subscription / hlk_billing_plane-missing / kirbe-vs-holistika_ops disambiguation) + CLI surface (--self-test / --audit-customers / --audit-subscriptions / --output-json / --output-csv). Default mode runs at INFO advisory (never blocks gate); operator invokes runbook on demand before B-2c go-live OR when finops-writer-worker surfaces counterparty_resolution=manual_review OPS rows in OPERATOR_INBOX.md per R1-a engagement-model-aware router design. Self-test mode keeps CI cost at ~1s. Paired runbook + Pydantic SSOT + pytest (test_stripe_audit_metadata.py 18 PASS) + cursor-rule alignment (akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc Rule 1 AC-HUMAN + AC-AUTOMATION) shipped at this commit.

Initiative 86 Wave N (D-IH-86-CD, 2026-05-21): baseline index integrity discipline self-test. Validates akos/hlk_index_integrity.py Pydantic SSOT (IndexFreshnessRow + IndexFreshnessReport frozen models) + scripts/baseline_index_sweep.py PROBE_REGISTRY shape (8 probes; one per dimension code IDX-01..IDX-08; 6 baseline + 2 conditional). Does NOT run the actual 8-dimension sweep (that's event_triggered cadence per the INDEX_INTEGRITY_DISCIPLINE.md canonical §4 + process_list.csv hol_peopl_dtp_index_integrity_001 cadence column: fires at wave-close + canonical-CSV mint). Self-test mode keeps CI cost at ~2s. Paired runbook + canonical + SOP + cursor rule + skill + Pydantic chassis shipped Wave N P3.

Initiative 86 Wave P (D-IH-86-CN, 2026-05-22): full baseline-index integrity sweep in strict mode. Promoted INFO->FAIL immediately per operator ratification. Exits non-zero on drift/gap/blocked findings.

Initiative 86 Wave R+1 Commit 2b + Commit 2b-ext (D-IH-86-DD + D-IH-86-DE, 2026-05-25): collaborator-share discipline self-test (13th Quality Fabric specialty). Validates akos/hlk_collaborator_share.py Pydantic SSOT (CollaboratorShareRow with share_pattern enum column + HolistikaVendorBilledRow + PartnerOverlapClauseRow + CollaboratorMarketRateRow + CollaboratorRateOverrideRow + CollaboratorShareAuditRow + CollaboratorShareAuditReport frozen models) + scripts/validate_collaborator_share.py CHECK_REGISTRY shape (8 checks; CS-01..CS-08: structural validation + cross-CSV FK resolution + per-pattern split-sums-to-100 + per-pattern default-split audit + bill-mode-default consistency + rate-within-market-band + override-expiry audit + share_pattern enum membership). share_pattern enum {deep_partner_65_35, orchestration_broker_thin_margin, custom} branches CS-03 (per-row vs across-rows vs skipped) + CS-04 (65/35 audit vs 6%-Holistika-total audit vs mandatory override). Does NOT run the actual 8-check audit (that's event_triggered cadence per the COLLABORATOR_SHARE_DOCTRINE.md canonical §3 + process_list.csv hol_peopl_dtp_collaborator_share_001 cadence_type: fires at engagement-mint + quarterly review). Self-test mode keeps CI cost at ~2s. INFO ramp at mint per akos-collaborator-share.mdc RULE 5; promotes to FAIL at Wave R+3 once first non-trivial engagement settles + operator ratifies. Operator-ratified economic models: deep_partner_65_35 = 65% Holistika / 35% collaborator out of BENEFITS (formula-c-hybrid TRUE-MARGIN); orchestration_broker_thin_margin = Holistika ~6% per row out of REVENUE (across-row aggregate = 100%); custom = operator-defined per row with mandatory ratifying decision FK. Paired runbook scripts/collaborator_share_calculate.py also runs self-test in pre_commit. Paired SOP scripts/SOP-PEOPLE_COLLABORATOR_SHARE_001.md + cursor rule akos-collaborator-share.mdc + skill .cursor/skills/collaborator-share-craft/SKILL.md land in Commit 2c.

Initiative 86 Wave R+1 P3 Commit 2b (D-IH-86-EA + D-IH-86-EB + D-IH-86-EC + D-IH-86-ED, 2026-05-25): synthesis-before-tranche discipline self-test (14th Quality Fabric specialty). Validates akos/hlk_synthesis_before_tranche.py Pydantic SSOT (SynthesisFindingRow + SynthesisTrancheCharter + SynthesisReportSummary frozen models) + 5 enum frozensets (VALID_DIMENSION_CODES x 10 + VALID_TRANCHE_CLASSES x 6 + VALID_DISPOSITIONS x 5 + VALID_FINDING_STATUSES x 5 + VALID_REVERSIBILITY_CLASSES x 3 + VALID_SWEEP_TRIGGERS x 4) + DIMENSION_FIRE_RULES per-class invariants (always + conditional disjoint; subset of VALID_DIMENSION_CODES) + resolve_fire_set helper round-trip. Does NOT run an actual per-tranche sweep (that's tranche_charter cadence per the SYNTHESIS_BEFORE_TRANCHE_DISCIPLINE.md canonical + process_list cadence column: fires at tranche charter + tranche pre-commit). Self-test mode keeps CI cost at ~3s. Paired runbook scripts/synthesis_before_tranche_check.py emits per-tranche reports under docs/wip/planning/86-.../reports/. INFO ramp at mint per D-IH-86-ED (broad-fire + judgement-class WARN tolerance); FAIL ramp gates per akos-synthesis-before-tranche.mdc RULE 5 once 3+ tranches across 2+ tranche classes apply the discipline cleanly + operator ratifies promotion decision.

Initiative 86 Wave R+1 P3 Commit 2b (D-IH-86-EA + D-IH-86-ED, 2026-05-25): synthesis-before-tranche runbook self-test (paired runbook of the SOP+runbook pair per akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc Rule 1 AC-AUTOMATION). Verifies the 10-dimension probe dispatch table covers VALID_DIMENSION_CODES exactly (no missing probes; no orphan probes for unknown dimensions) + runs sweep_tranche() on a runbook-self-test fixture (a specialty_mint tranche charter representing Commit 2b itself) + asserts zero FAIL findings on the fixture. The specialty_mint fire-set yields 7 baseline + 1 conditional (SYN-03 fires when scenarios_named present) = 8 dimensions; runbook-self-test fixture has J-OP-only (audiences) + 4 ratifying decisions (D-IH-86-EA..ED) + atomic commit + medium reversibility + closing-loop test named = 6 PASS + 2 INFO (channels/scenarios acceptably empty for J-OP-only specialty mint). Pure in-memory probe check; CI cost at ~2s.

I86 Wave R+4 C1.6: research-action source-ledger self-test. Validates akos/hlk_research_action.py Pydantic SSOT (ResearchSourceRow + ResearchSourceLedgerSummary) and source-ledger fieldnames before research findings can drive strategic / tactical / operational canonical edits.

I75 Wave R+5 C1: Research Radar 16th QF specialty self-test. Validates akos/hlk_research_radar.py Pydantic SSOT + INTELLIGENCEOPS_REGISTER_FIELDNAMES (21 cols incl. volatility_class/staleness_days/staleness_posture/next_verify_by).

I90 P3b OPS-86-9: TechOps reliability check self-test. Validates akos/hlk_techops_reliability.py Pydantic SSOT (TECH-01..TECH-07) + scripts/techops_reliability_check.py PROBE_REGISTRY; stub sweep emits skip until MCP live probes at deploy cadence. INFO ramp per TECHOPS_DISCIPLINE.md charter status.

I90 P3c OPS-86-19: DataOps quality check self-test. Validates akos/hlk_dataops_quality.py Pydantic SSOT (DATA-01..DATA-07) + scripts/dataops_quality_check.py PROBE_REGISTRY; stub sweep emits skip until mirror/FDW live probes at canonical-CSV mint cadence. INFO ramp per DATAOPS_DISCIPLINE.md active status (D-IH-90-AA).
I95 DATA-05: Plane-1 column-alignment guard self-test (~0s). Full 11-CSV sweep runs in validate_hlk.py CSV_COLUMN_ALIGNMENT.
I95 DATA-05: offline Pydantic enum subset migration CHECK parser self-test (~0s). Full binding check runs in validate_hlk.py PYDANTIC_MIRROR_ENUM_SSOT.

Fleet hygiene self-test: akos/hlk_fleet_hygiene.py (FLEET-01 worktree, FLEET-02 publish drift, FLEET-03 CI content, FLEET-04 standing OPS). Full --sweep at session/release-gate INFO; watches OPS-81-1/86-1/86-9/90-6 without operator reminder.

D-IH-90-R: Cursor rule tier self-test (policy config/cursor-rule-tiers.json). Validates <=max always-on rules match core_always_on_slugs; no always-on+globs. Full .cursor/rules scan on demand or at tier-policy change review.
D-IH-86-CT / I90 P2f: rule x skill pairing self-test. WARN ramp for missing *-craft skills on governance rules; exempt list in akos/hlk_rule_skill_pairing.py.

I86 Wave R+4 C3a: MKTOps 7-dimension campaign quality bar self-test. Validates akos/hlk_mktops.py Pydantic SSOT (MKTOpsCampaignManifest + MKTOpsFindingRow + MKTOpsCampaignReport) plus the 7 dimension codes plus funnel-stage and lifecycle-state enums. Activated when MKTOPS_DISCIPLINE.md flipped charter -> active per D-IH-86-EY.

Initiative 86 Wave R+1 Commit 2b + Commit 2b-ext (D-IH-86-DD + D-IH-86-DE, 2026-05-25): collaborator-share calculator self-test (paired runbook of the SOP+runbook pair per akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc Rule 1 AC-AUTOMATION). Computes engagement settlements branching on share_pattern: deep_partner_65_35 (TRUE-MARGIN: revenue - transparent project costs = benefits -> 65/35 default split or per-row deviation), orchestration_broker_thin_margin (per-row revenue slice; no cost subtraction; advisory Holistika-total ~6% margin), custom (manual placeholder + operator narrative). Worked-example fixtures cover all 3 patterns plus the original deep_partner deep_partner_65_35 fixture: 100k EUR revenue - 20k EUR costs = 80k EUR benefits -> 52k EUR Holistika + 28k EUR Collaborator. Pure in-memory arithmetic check (no CSV reads); CI cost at ~2s. Operationalises COLLABORATOR_SHARE_DOCTRINE.md §2 settlement formula + COLLABORATOR_SHARE_REGISTRY share_pattern enum branching.

Initiative 86 Wave R+1 P1 (D-IH-86-CW, 2026-05-24): UAT discipline 12th Quality Fabric specialty self-test. Validates akos/hlk_uat_report.py Pydantic SSOT (UATReport + CanonicalFieldTestWindow + sub-models frozen) + scripts/validate_uat_report.py fixture round-trips. Does NOT run the actual --report sweep across all UAT files (that's per-UAT-mint cadence per UAT_DISCIPLINE.md §8.5 + process_list.csv hol_peopl_dtp_uat_governance_001 cadence_type=event_triggered). Self-test mode keeps CI cost at ~2s. Paired SOP + addendum + runbook + cursor rule + skill + process_list row + pattern-registry row + field_test_window: frontmatter block all ship at Commit 1; INFO->FAIL ramp per akos-uat-discipline.mdc RULE 4 aligned with the 3-wave (S/T/U) field-test window observation lifecycle.

Initiative 86 Wave R+1 Commit 3-a (D-IH-86-CX, 2026-05-25): PASS-WITH-FOLLOWUP governance 12th-row Quality Fabric specialty self-test (content axis paired with UAT_DISCIPLINE classification axis; composes multiplicatively per HOLISTIKA_QUALITY_FABRIC.md Section 3). Validates akos/hlk_pwf_governance.py Pydantic SSOT (PWFFollowupRationale + PWFGovernanceFinding + PWFGovernanceReport frozen models + 5-class followup taxonomy frozenset + 5-finding-code PWF-FM-01..05 frozenset) + scripts/validate_pwf_governance.py fixture constructors + parse_followup_rationale 4-shape input coverage. Does NOT run the actual --all sweep across all in-scope UAT reports (that's per-uat-mint cadence per PASS_WITH_FOLLOWUP_GOVERNANCE_DISCIPLINE.md Section 4 + process_list.csv hol_peopl_dtp_pwf_governance_001 cadence_type=event_triggered). Self-test mode keeps CI cost at ~2s. Paired SOP + canonical doctrine + cursor rule + skill + process_list row + pattern-registry row + PRECEDENCE entries all ship at Commit 3-a; INFO->FAIL ramp per akos-pwf-governance.mdc RULE 4 gated on Wave T at earliest + 3 consecutive clean wave-close sweeps + operator-explicit decision row.

Initiative 86 Wave L (D-IH-86-BG, 2026-05-21): composite validator over the 3 registries that compose the 4-layer output architecture beneath the 5-axis Quality Fabric (D-IH-86-BB Wave K mint). Layer 1 OUTPUT_TYPE_REGISTRY (medium / shape) + Layer 2 ARTIFACT_CLASS_REGISTRY (named purpose) + Layer 3 COMPONENT_PRIMITIVE_REGISTRY (Shadcn-shape granular primitives). Header drift gates + Pydantic per-row validation + cross-FK resolution: ARTIFACT_CLASS.output_type_codes -> OUTPUT_TYPE_REGISTRY ; ARTIFACT_CLASS.typical_audience_codes -> AUDIENCE_REGISTRY ; COMPONENT_PRIMITIVE.parent_artifact_class_codes -> ARTIFACT_CLASS_REGISTRY ; *.last_review_decision_id -> DECISION_REGISTER ; render_targets tokens -> VALID_RENDER_TARGETS ; kind tokens -> VALID_KINDS. Strict from day one (the registries minted at Wave K already pass).

I81 P1 (D-IH-81-K Wave H lane-2, 2026-05-19) — INFO advisory KB integrity baseline audit per master-roadmap §3 P1 deliverable. Walks process_list.csv executable rows (item_granularity in {task, process}) + joins KNOWLEDGE_PAIRING_REGISTRY.csv + v3.0 SOP corpus scan + cadence column; emits matrix CSV + audit narrative under docs/wip/planning/81-vault-integrity-layout-milestones-retrofit/reports/i81/. PASS threshold ≥ 95% per D-IH-81-F gates at I81 P9 closure UAT (not here at P1 baseline) — pass_rate is expected to be near-zero at baseline because audience_tags_status is deferred for every row pending I85 wire follow-up. The metric becomes meaningful as P4-P8 retrofits land + the I85 wire commit flips audience_tags_deferred → audience_tags_matched. Pydantic chassis: akos/hlk_kb_integrity.py (KbIntegrityMatrixRow + KbIntegrityAuditSummary). Paired runbook per akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc RULE 1.

pre_commit_fast.description: I95 CI fast path (~2-4 min): inventory + drift + HLK umbrella + HCAM/FK-verb L3 + API smoke + DataOps/two-plane self-tests. Skips full pytest, Playwright, release-gate, and brand/external-render sweeps (run pre_commit before merge/release).

steps.description: Template-contract AKOS inventory (OVERALL: PASS; --template skips local env overlay)
Repo vs runtime drift (agent/A2A inventory, tools policy)
HLK umbrella (canonical CSV validators + two-plane DATA-02/DATA-05 guards)
I95 P1 HCAM: entity catalog + relationship registry integrity
I95 L3 FK->verb: process_list, baseline_organisation, capability/decision/ops registers map to active HCAM triples
FastAPI control plane + Madeira interaction (fast pytest subset)
DataOps probe chassis self-test (DATA-02/DATA-05 live probes)
Plane-1 column-alignment guard self-test
Pydantic enum subset migration CHECK parser self-test
I95 P95-GOV-1: CANONICAL_GOVERNANCE_REGISTRY chassis self-test (73-row vault inventory contract)

dossier_smoke.description: Initiative 48 P9: standalone dossier snapshot smoke (same argv as pre_commit dossier_smoke step)

steps.description: Render operator UAT dossier markdown via snapshot mode

ops8615_mirror_emit.description: I93 P6 OPS-86-15 gap mirrors: row-count preflight then emit five batched upsert SQL files under docs/wip/planning/93-.../artifacts/ops8615-batches/. Operator apply: pwsh -File scripts/apply_mirror_batches.ps1 -Preset ops8615 (linked supabase db query --linked -f); psql alternative per docs/guides/holistika-mirror-dml-apply.md.

steps.description: Row counts for AIC AUDIENCE CAPABILITY CAPABILITY_CONFIDENCE COUNTRY_WORK_CALENDAR mirrors
Write five per-table upsert SQL batches + MANIFEST.md (SQL Editor-safe splits; psql for large tables)

compliance_mirror_emit.description: Initiative 14/18/21: preflight CSV row counts then emit compliance mirror upsert SQL to artifacts/sql/compliance_mirror_upsert.sql (operator reviews before DB apply). Apply via docs/guides/holistika-mirror-dml-apply.md (apply_mirror_batches.ps1 + supabase db query --linked -f, or psql). Covers GOI/POI, adviser disciplines/questions, filed instruments.

steps.description: Row counts from git CSVs (process_list, baseline, FINOPS counterparty register, GOI/POI, adviser disciplines/questions, filed instruments)
Write full mirror upsert SQL (process_list + baseline + all Initiative 21 registers) for operator review

export_adviser_handoff_smoke.description: Initiative 21 / P7: render the adviser handoff bundle for all disciplines as Markdown to artifacts/exports/handoff-smoke.md (no PDF). Operator runs before sending real handoffs.

steps.description: Render ADVOPS handoff (all disciplines, MD) for PRJ-HOL-FOUNDING-2026

export_adviser_handoff_pdf_smoke.description: Initiative 22 / P6: render the adviser handoff bundle as PDF via WeasyPrint to artifacts/exports/handoff-smoke.pdf. SKIPs gracefully when WeasyPrint+markdown are not installed (install via `py -m pip install -r requirements-export.txt`).

steps.description: Render ADVOPS handoff (all disciplines, PDF) for PRJ-HOL-FOUNDING-2026

optional_executor_harness.description: Optional pytest oracle (set AKOS_EXECUTOR_HARNESS=1 before running)

steps.description: Executor harness optional tests

wave2_backfill_check.description: Wave-2 (Initiatives 23-26) operator-answers sentinel scan: prints per-section counts of __OPERATOR_CONFIRM__ tokens remaining in docs/wip/planning/22a-i22-post-closure-followups/operator-answers-wave2.yaml. Always exits 0 (informational); the YAML is operator-filled at their pace and downstream phases gate on individual sections.

steps.description: Sentinel scan for operator-answers-wave2.yaml

compliance_mirror_drift_probe.description: Initiative 23 P4: verify parity between canonical compliance CSVs and live Supabase mirror row counts. The probe is operator-pasted: run `--emit-sql` to print the JSON SELECT for user-supabase MCP `execute_sql`, paste the JSON result into `artifacts/probes/mirror-drift-<YYYYMMDD>.json`, then re-run with `--verify` (the default). SKIPs gracefully when no fresh artifact exists (does not block CI).

steps.description: Verify the latest artifacts/probes/mirror-drift-*.json against canonical CSV row counts

render_topic_graph_smoke.description: Initiative 25 P3: render the cross-program topic graph from `dimensions/TOPIC_REGISTRY.csv` to `_assets/_meta/topic_graph.{mmd,png,svg}` via `scripts/render_topic_graph.py`. The script reuses `render_km_diagrams.py` for the PNG/SVG pipeline (mmdc preferred, mermaid.ink HTTP fallback). Operator runs after any topic-registry row change.

steps.description: Render _assets/_meta/topic_graph.{mmd,png,svg} from TOPIC_REGISTRY.csv

render_km_diagrams_batch_smoke.description: Initiative 25 P8: render every .mmd under docs/references/hlk/v3.0/_assets/ via render_km_diagrams.py --all --dry-run. Surfaces diagram source discovery without touching .png/.svg sidecars. Operator runs `py scripts/render_km_diagrams.py --all` to refresh all rasters when needed.

steps.description: Discover all .mmd sources and report what would render (no writes)

export_adviser_handoff_html_smoke.description: Initiative 24 P5: render the adviser handoff bundle as HTML to artifacts/exports/handoff-smoke.html. Single-file HTML envelope wrapping the MD body — paste-into-email-client friendly. SKIPs gracefully when canonical CSVs are absent (output script handles this).

steps.description: Render ADVOPS handoff (all disciplines, HTML) for PRJ-HOL-FOUNDING-2026

render_pmo_hub_smoke.description: Initiative 25 P5: verify the PMO hub stakeholder index auto-generated section is in parity with canonical CSVs. Runs render_pmo_hub.py --check-only; FAILs on AUTOGEN_DRIFT_DETECTED or MARKER_NOT_FOUND. Operator runs `py scripts/render_pmo_hub.py` to refresh, then commits.

steps.description: Verify PMO hub stakeholder index is in parity with canonical CSVs

wip_dashboard_render_smoke.description: Initiative 32 P10: verify the WIP dashboard auto-rendered section is in parity with each initiative's master-roadmap.md frontmatter. Runs render_wip_dashboard.py --check-only; FAILs on drift. Operator runs `py scripts/render_wip_dashboard.py` to refresh, then commits.

steps.description: Verify WIP dashboard is in parity with each initiative master-roadmap

neo4j_governance_kg_drift_smoke.description: Initiative 46 P2: nightly drift canary comparing Neo4j label counts to canonical CSV row counts. SKIPs gracefully when Neo4j unconfigured. CSV-only mode prints CSV count summary without touching Neo4j.

steps.description: scripts/graphrag_drift_canary.py - asserts each axis-6 dimension is within tolerance (default 1 row)

playwright_a11y_smoke.description: Initiative 54 P5: Playwright + axe-core a11y smoke audit on madeira_control + dossier HTML surfaces. Pre-commit: warn-only when axe-playwright-python is not installed (SKIP gracefully per R-54-1). Release-gate: Critical-only fail (D-IH-54-A). Run with: py scripts/browser-smoke.py --playwright --axe.

steps.description: Run tests/playwright/ DOM-source contract + wiring tests (run without Playwright installed; SKIP for live conditional-render tests when render_dossier_html signature differs).

scripts/browser-smoke.py --playwright --axe. SKIPs when Playwright workers unusable or axe-playwright-python missing (per R-54-1 / R-54-4). Emits Critical/Serious counts per in-scope surface in JSON_RESULTS for downstream gating.

regression_loop_smoke.description: Initiative 55 P6: smoke run of the regression-to-advisor continuous loop tooling. Tier A only (no LLM cost; no SMTP). Verifies regression_artifact_diff.py + propose_advisor_update.py contracts, including the both-signal-and-silence telemetry path (D-IH-55-E). Does NOT fire G-24-3 (per-fire IRREVERSIBLE; operator-only).

steps.description: Run tests/test_regression_artifact_diff.py + tests/test_propose_advisor_update.py (34 tests covering threshold parsing, evaluate, render, append, main).

cicd_baseline_check.description: Initiative 68 P2 + P4 + P5: standalone CICD-baseline + observability validator suite. Today wraps `validate_playwright_baseline.py` (P2 / D-IH-68-B), `validate_sentry_release_format.py` (P4 / D-IH-68-I), and `validate_cicd_baseline.py` (P5 / D-IH-68-D). Set `AKOS_PLAYWRIGHT_BASELINE_SCAN_CONSUMERS=1` / `AKOS_SENTRY_RELEASE_SCAN_CONSUMERS=1` / `AKOS_CICD_BASELINE_SCAN_CONSUMERS=1` to enable consumer-repo scanning (default-off until sibling-repo carry-overs land + canonical CSV gate at PAUSE POINT #3 ships the new REPOSITORY_REGISTRY.csv columns).

steps.description: Validate the AKOS canonical Playwright config template + optionally each consumer-repo's playwright.config.ts (per `AKOS_PLAYWRIGHT_BASELINE_SCAN_CONSUMERS` env var)
Validate the AKOS canonical Sentry dashboard doc + optionally each consumer-repo's Sentry init code (per `AKOS_SENTRY_RELEASE_SCAN_CONSUMERS` env var)

Validate the AKOS canonical SOP-CICD_BASELINE_001 + GitHub Actions workflow template + Render YAML stub + optionally each REPOSITORY_REGISTRY.csv row's ci_baseline_* columns (per `AKOS_CICD_BASELINE_SCAN_CONSUMERS` env var)

eval_harness_smoke.description: Initiative 45 P6: pre_commit-eligible smoke run of the unified eval harness. Tier A only (deterministic; no LLM cost). Combines smoke + canary + rubric + replay + adversarial modes.

steps.description: Run scripts/eval.py --mode all + --mode replay + --mode adversarial under Tier A
Replay all cassettes (Tier A; no LLM cost)
Adversarial cassette suite (12 probes; 3 vectors)
Cassette PII linter (R-45-4 enforcement)

engagement_model_registry_smoke.description: Initiative 73 P1: standalone ENGAGEMENT_MODEL_REGISTRY validator smoke (D-IH-73-C sibling-dimension; D-IH-73-D 7-class taxonomy). Runs scripts/validate_engagement_model_registry.py against the canonical CSV at docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Admin/O5-1/People/People Operations/canonicals/dimensions/ENGAGEMENT_MODEL_REGISTRY.csv. Per-row Pydantic instantiation (Literal enums + slug regex + access_level int 0-6) + 7-class taxonomy completeness check + FK to baseline_organisation.csv (People Operations Manager = Data Owner per D-IH-73-C).

steps.description: Run scripts/validate_engagement_model_registry.py

people_design_pattern_registry_smoke.description: Initiative 79 P2: standalone PEOPLE_DESIGN_PATTERN_REGISTRY validator smoke (registry mode + jargon-scan mode). Runs scripts/validate_design_pattern_registry.py twice — once in default registry mode (header drift + Pydantic per row + FK resolution to DECISION_REGISTER + INITIATIVE_REGISTRY + consumer_areas semicolon-token validation) and once in --jargon-scan mode (anti-jargon drift gate over People canonicals per D-IH-79-N; mirrors I66 brand-baseline-reality drift gate shape). Tech Lab canonicals are exempt from the jargon scan (they legitimately carry framework names).

steps.description: Run scripts/validate_design_pattern_registry.py (registry mode)
Run scripts/validate_design_pattern_registry.py --jargon-scan (anti-jargon drift gate per D-IH-79-N)

brand_voice_register_smoke.description: Initiative 71 P1 Pack A1: standalone brand voice register validator smoke (10 enforcement layers; strict-day-1 per D-IH-71-F + C-71-8). Loads register-pack.yml from canonicals/_validators/. Scans consumer i18n JSON files for FR anglicisms + ES patterns + EN MBA-deck jargon + 7 AI-tone tic families + anti-LLM-tone catalog. Layers 3-7 + 9 (audience matrix; Storytelling/Resonance boundary; sub-mark archetype; voice persona; locale-leak; cobrand; track-record; brand-abbrev) load as INFO-level chassis pending forward-charter markdown-surface scan.

steps.description: Run scripts/validate_brand_voice_register.py --strict-empty --pack-path canonicals/_validators/register-pack.yml

substrate_audit_smoke.description: Initiative 84 P6: Research Substrate Audit Cadence runbook smoke (paired with SOP-RESEARCH_SUBSTRATE_AUDIT_CADENCE_001.md per akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc Rule 1). Runs scripts/peopl_research_substrate_audit_cadence.py --staleness-check (verifies no SUBSTRATE_REGISTRY row's last_audit_date is > 90 days old per D-IH-84-H quarterly cadence) plus the dedicated pytest suite tests/test_peopl_research_substrate_audit_cadence.py (CLI mode coverage: --staleness-check / --uat-mode / --emit-delta / --list-quarters / default).

Run tests/test_peopl_research_substrate_audit_cadence.py via pytest

impeccable_bridge_drift_smoke.description: Initiative 77 P2: Impeccable bridge drift gate smoke. Asserts every active brand canonical in CANONICAL_REGISTRY.csv (owning_area=Marketing AND owning_role=Brand AND non-SOP) is cited as a cross-reference in >= 1 of the 3 workspace-root bridges (PRODUCT.md / DESIGN.md / BASELINE_REALITY.md) per SOP-HLK_TOOLING_STANDARDS_001.md §3.7 thin-redirect contract. Soft-30d-then-strict default per D-IH-77-C; promote to strict with AKOS_IMPECCABLE_BRIDGE_DRIFT_STRICT=1. Also runs sibling generator in --check mode for coverage report. Pydantic chassis: akos/impeccable_bridge.py.

steps.description: Run scripts/validate_impeccable_bridge_drift.py (soft mode default)
Run scripts/generate_impeccable_bridges.py --check (coverage report; non-mutating)
